channel.title: Page Preview in decoupled mode?
channel.description:
Hello,
Reading the docs, it seems like page preview is one of the pros of Embedded mode. I was wondering if page preview is also possible with decoupled mode?
I was thinking something like, could you run the frontity plugin in your wordpress just for page preview, while using frontity as your main domain and benefiting from best performances?

item.title: Page Preview in decoupled mode?
item.dc:creator: alexis.doroszkiewicz
item.description:
Hello,

Reading the docs, it seems like page preview is one of the pros of Embedded mode.
I was wondering if page preview is also possible with decoupled mode?

I was thinking something like, could you run the frontity plugin in your wordpress just for page preview, while using frontity as your main domain and benefiting from best performances?

Read full topic
